title: OSI, TCP/IP, Encapsulation, and Traffic Evidence · Operations Brief: Net Packet Capture Limits
summary: Trace a client request through host, switch, router, firewall, service, and return path using captures and diagrams. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net packet capture limits increment in a layered packet-flow diagnosis. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret frame, packet, transport, and application capture fields while accounting for vantage point, encryption, offload, and missing traffic.
Compare TCP reliability and state with UDP datagrams and select transport behavior from application requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
